home.letUsKnow: Let us know what we can do for you!
home.branding_desc: Creating a strategy adapted to you
home.design_desc: Building a website to suit your need
home.socialMedia_desc: Helping you to grow your traffic
home.jumbotronTitle: Welcome to the best digital creative studio in the world
home.jumbotronText: Based on no real scientific studies, but we have high hopes.
home.aboutUsText: We are a humble, yet very ambitious digital creative studio based in Montreal. Why do we do this? Simple: there are too many studios and freelancers out there that take your money and don't do a good job (trust us, we've seen things...). We want to fix that! We can guarantee that you will not find tenacity like ours in any other studio.

web-design.label: Web Design & Development

web-design.has-website: Do you have an existing website or application?
web-design.needs-redesign: Does it need a full redesign?

web-design.needs-new-features: Do you need new features or functionality added?

web-design.is-platform: Are you looking to build something more than a standard website — like a platform or a tool?
web-design.needs-auth: Will users need to log in and have accounts?
web-design.needs-roles: Do you need different access levels for different types of users?

hosting.label: Hosting & Maintenance
hosting.label_desc: Get your hosting, maintenance, and support fully managed.

hosting.wants-monitoring: Do you want ongoing security and performance monitoring?
hosting.wants-monthly-report: Do you want a monthly report on uptime and performance?
hosting.needs-backup: Do you need help with backups and recovery in case something goes wrong?

seo.label_desc: Grow your online visibility through SEO and social media.
seo.wants-seo: Do you want your website to show up higher in search results?
seo.has-seo-review: Has your site ever been reviewed for technical SEO issues?
seo.wants-seo-reports: Do you want ongoing monitoring and regular SEO reports?
seo.needs-social-setup-seo: Do you also need your social media profiles set up?

seo.should-match-brand: Should they match an existing logo and visual identity?
